reviews.review_description: I just love the concept of this because i don't want to attend the churches where i live. But i cant get thr audio to read the bible to me, i really need that function to work because pronouncing words in the bible is impossible for me, The church you have created is absolutely beautiful And feels comforting to be in. Can you please tell me how to get the audio working? oh and how to turn off the piano it's very distracting when trying to read the bible. Thank you

reviews.review_title: Great idea but the music ruins it
reviews.review_description: Love the idea of this, a place to read the Bible and/or play.. the problem is the piano music, I can’t find anyway of turning it off… when I’m reading/praying the last thing I want is piano music (or any music really).. yes I could turn down the volume of the headset but there’s some subtle environmental sounds (like page turning) that I want to keep.. am I missing something? (There’s a radio beside me but the buttons don’t do anything)
Please remove the completely unnecessary and annoying piano music! It's very distracting, isn't there a piano playing in the church?
I love it but I would love it more if it had hand tracking

This app promotes a religion that, according to its own scripture (e.g. John 3:18, 3:36), condemns non-believers to eternal punishment simply for not accepting its doctrine. That’s not education or inspiration - it's coercion. The message boils down to: believe in Jesus or suffer forever. That's a deeply immoral ultimatum, analogous to a gangster threatening your life unless you obey.

Religious freedom includes freedom from religion. The Meta Quest platform is primarily for entertainment, creativity, and education - not for pushing divisive ideologies or doctrines that cast most of humanity as eternally da mned.

I make it a ten out of ten because I go to church 💒 on Sunday I play it when I don't go to church 💯😘😇🫡👾🤖👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👍👈👉👆👇☝️✋🗣 church is the best

I love this idea, and i have few suggestions:
- I wish to see many languages available for reading the Bible. (as an example, I am reading the bible in Arabic language) .
- Privet room, is wonderful idea, but the resolution of the religios icons on the windows, are too low. The same update is required for the Drawing Room as well. 
- In the Private Room, if there will be any updates in the relgiose icons, can we have the option to select between many available icons? 
The current icon is great (the Father, the Son and the Holy Spirit), but maybe adding a big Cross in one of the corners, (with a place to pray in) , in the same room, will be enought, rather than, adding a new option for changing the icons

Thank you for your great work.. God bless you.

As a person of faith I've wanted something like this for some time. I like the idea of being transported to a church setting and the options for Bible reading, service and prayer/meditation. It has a great start with the basics. One big distraction, In all cases where you are read to or hear a service, its delivered by a electronic narrator. It's not bad but noticeable.
I have so many thoughts about what id like to have in here and I say that in a good way. I want this app to be successful and I look forward to seeing more! I'll jump into the Discord and offer my suggestions.

developer_response.body: Hi, Rick! Thanks so much for your thoughtful review! We are glad that you are enjoying your reading and meditating time in Gospel, also we sincerely welcome you to join our discord (https://discord.gg/Vf8vRw6Bz7). I will propose a replacement of that electronic narrator to our director.  We also welcome you to send message via facebook (https://www.facebook.com/Gospel-108550761853876/), thank you again for your love of Gospel. Peace to you!

reviews.review_description: This is such a great app! I tried the app since it was on Sidequest, now it has two more rooms to stay in, the space and the Bible are very user friendly and helpful.  I love having the Bible read when I feel I need it!
Really nice app!  Great place to read, or meditate.

developer_response.body: Hi, Aaron Sommers! We are happy that you are enjoying your reading and meditating time in Gospel, and we welcome you to join our discord (https://discord.gg/Vf8vRw6Bz7) to find more like-minded people or to communicate with us, we are eager to hear more suggestions from you to improve the user experience in the app. We also welcome you to send message via facebook (https://www.facebook.com/Gospel-108550761853876/), thank you again for your love of Gospel. Peace to you!
